title: Taiwan Stock Market Datasets
notes: Preferred source for historical OHLCV, institutional flows, margin, valuation, revenue and financial statement datasets where available.

title: 上市櫃公司公告與財務資訊
notes: Canonical source for major news, financial reports, monthly revenue, dividends and company disclosures.

title: TWSE OpenAPI / Open Data
notes: Official exchange data used for market, company and announcement cross-checks.

title: CoWoS advanced packaging technology platform
notes: Official product/technology reference for TSMC CoWoS family used by the 2330 product knowledge sample.

title: SoIC 3D silicon stacking technology
notes: Official product/technology reference for TSMC SoIC used by the 2330 product knowledge sample.

title: N2 process technology
notes: Official technology reference for TSMC N2 used by the 2330 product knowledge sample.

title: A16 process technology announcement
notes: Official TSMC announcement reference for A16 and backside power delivery used by the 2330 product knowledge sample.
